steps.title: Convert feet to yards
steps.content:
Since $3$ feet equal $1$ yard, divide the feet-per-second speed by $3$.
$$
\frac{6}{25}\div3=\frac{6}{25}\cdot\frac{1}{3}
$$

steps.title: Simplify the converted speed
steps.content: Multiply and reduce the fraction. $$ \frac{6}{25}\cdot\frac{1}{3}=\frac{6}{75}=\frac{2}{25} $$ The answer is D.
